description: Designed for those who enjoy those casual Sports, the fila Stradd is a great buy.UpperSynthetic leather upper for absolute durabilityStrategically placed synthetic overlays for enhanced shoe structureLace-up system for a snug, customized FitPadded tongue and collar for snug, all-day comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs on the forefoot and grooves on the back foot for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
